creator: areilly@bigpond.net.au
text:
On Tue, May 13, 2008 at 02:23:47PM +1000, Andrew Reilly wrote:
> The one in /usr/local/include belongs to sablevm-1.13_2,
> according to pkg_info -W, so I'll remove that and see how things
> go from there...

After pkg_deleting sablevm, jdk16 built and installed without
problems.  I'll file a pr against sablevm.

Cheers.

-- 
Andrew
